entries.definition:
overlapping exists between this root and the root ع/ص/ي ʿ-ṣ-y, philologists classify them together under a single heading. Of this root, two forms occur 12 times in the Qurʾan: عَصًا ʿaṣā 10 times and عِصِيّ ʿiṣiyy twice.
عَصًا ʿaṣā [n., pl. عِصِيّ ʿiṣiyy] stick, staff, crook (20:18) قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ ‘It is my staff,’ he said, ‘I lean on it.’
entries.definition_english:
overlapping exists between this root and the root ع/ص/ي ʿ-ṣ-y, philologists classify them together under a single heading. Of this root, two forms occur 12 times in the Qurʾan: عَصًا ʿaṣā 10 times and عِصِيّ ʿiṣiyy twice.
عَصًا ʿaṣā [n., pl. عِصِيّ ʿiṣiyy] stick, staff, crook (20:18) قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ ‘It is my staff,’ he said, ‘I lean on it.’

entries.definition:
ʿ-ṣ-y to disobey, to mutiny, to refuse, to defy, to be rebellious (also see: ع/ص/و ʿ-ṣ-w). Of this root, four forms occur 32 times in the Qurʾan: عَصَى ʿaṣā 27 times; عَصِيّ ʿaṣiyy twice; عِصْيَان ʿiṣyān once and مَعْصِيَةٌ maʿṣiyatun twice.
عَصَى ʿaṣā I [v. trans.] to disobey (6:15) إِنْ عَصَيْتُ رَبِّي إِنِّي أَخَافُ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ I fear, if I disobey my Lord, the punishment of a dreadful Day.

عَصِيّ ʿaṣiyy [intens. act. part.] rebellious, one who is given to disobeying (19:44) إِنَّ الشَّيْطَانَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ عَصِيًّا indeed, Satan is rebellious against the Lord of Mercy.

عِصْيَان ʿiṣyān [v. n./n.] disobeying; disobedience, mutiny (49:7) وَكَرَّهَ إِلَيْكُمُ الْكُفْرَ وَالْفُسُوقَ وَالْعِصْيَانَ and He has made hateful to you disbelief, transgression and disobedience.

مَعْصِيَةٌ maʿṣiyatun [v. n.] disobeying (58:9) فَلَا تَتَنَاجَوْا بِالْإِثْمِ وَالْعُدْوَانِ وَمَعْصِيَةِ الرَّسُولِ do not confer with a view to sinful doings, aggression or disobeying the Messenger.
entries.definition_english:
